testcase.name: test_existing_email_does_not_reset_user_password

failure.message:
AssertionError: dummy_password must be empty for existing users, got 'OzbidfAb@113' assert 'OzbidfAb@113' == ''
+ OzbidfAb@113

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter37_onboarding_account.py:136: in test_existing_email_does_not_reset_user_password assert d.get("dummy_password", "") == "", f"dummy_password must be empty for existing users, got {d.get('dummy_password')!r}" E AssertionError: dummy_password must be empty for existing users, got 'OzbidfAb@113' E assert 'OzbidfAb@113' == '' E E + OzbidfAb@113
